name: narocatalog
description: NaroCatalog monorepo development and packaging commands

scripts.docker:restart: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml restart api
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml build --no-cache api && npm run docker:up
scripts.docker:rebuild:prod: docker compose build --no-cache api && npm run docker:up:prod
scripts.docker:logs:api: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f api
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec api alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:seed:pim: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/seed_pim.py
scripts.db:seed:fresh: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/seed_catalog.py --fresh
scripts.db:seed:stress: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/seed_stress_catalog.py
scripts.db:seed:stress:fresh: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/seed_stress_catalog.py --fresh
scripts.db:revision: docker compose exec api alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.setup: npm run docker:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed:pim && npm run db:seed:fresh && npm run desktop:install
scripts.audit:api1: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/audit_api1_stress_seeder.py
scripts.audit:variants: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/audit_variant_detection.py
scripts.audit:baseline: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/audit_category_baseline.py --baseline-mode pim_only
scripts.audit:category-contamination: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api python scripts/audit_category_contamination.py
scripts.test:api: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app api pytest tests/ -q -m "not integration"
scripts.test:api:integration: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app -e RUN_INTEGRATION=1 api pytest tests/ -q -m integration
scripts.test:api:full: docker compose exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app -e RUN_INTEGRATION=1 api pytest tests/ -q
scripts.pack:release: npm run pack:postgres && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File packaging/build-release.ps1
scripts.lint:python: python -m ruff check apps/api/app apps/api/tests apps/api/scripts
scripts.format:check:python: python -m ruff format --check apps/api/app apps/api/tests apps/api/scripts
